name: Opaline Oval Pool Deck Plan - 10x12 Pool Deck for 15x30 Oval Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15x30 oval above-ground pools
Efficient 10x12 deck footprint - ideal for compact spaces and smaller yards
Optimized walking clearance for safe and comfortable pool entry
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Simple, modern design - perfect for quick DIY builds & lower material costs
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with complete material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' x 30' oval above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Opaline Oval Pool Deck Plan transforms your 15x30 above-ground oval pool into a peaceful and functional backyard escape. Featuring a compact 10x12 platform layout, this design provides safe and convenient pool access while maintaining a clean, efficient footprint - perfect for small yards, streamlined builds, and budget-friendly projects. Opaline blends simplicity, safety, and modern outdoor style into one beautifully balanced pool deck solution. Key Features
